requirement_topic.en: Morocco Renewable-Energy Market Access and ADEREE / AMEE Policy Context
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥可再生能源市场准入与ADEREE/AMEE政策背景
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥再生能源市場准入與ADEREE/AMEE政策背景

summary.en: Morocco has adopted an ambitious renewable-energy programme targeting 52 percent renewable capacity by 2030, driven by MASEN (Moroccan Agency for Sustainable Energy) for large utility-scale projects and AMEE (Agence Marocaine pour l'Efficacité Energétique) for energy efficiency and distributed generation. Importers of PV inverters must comply with Moroccan customs requirements including HS code classification, any applicable import duties, and conformity documentation required by the Ministry of Industry or relevant arrêté. IMANOR conformity marks or CE marking (as a proxy indicator) may be required or expected by procurement rules for public projects, IFC or World Bank-financed projects, or private offtakers.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥实施雄心勃勃的可再生能源计划，目标是到2030年可再生能源装机占比达52%，大型公用事业规模项目由MASEN（摩洛哥可持续能源署）主导，分布式发电及能效项目由AMEE（摩洛哥能源效率署）主导。光伏逆变器进口商须遵守摩洛哥海关要求，包括HS编码归类、适用进口关税，以及工业部或相关部长令要求的合格文件。公共项目、IFC或世界银行资助项目及私人购电方的采购规则可能要求或期望提供IMANOR合格标志或CE标志（作为替代参照指标）。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥實施雄心勃勃的再生能源計畫，目標是到2030年再生能源裝機占比達52%，大型公用事業規模項目由MASEN（摩洛哥可持續能源署）主導，分布式發電及能效項目由AMEE（摩洛哥能源效率署）主導。光伏逆變器進口商須遵守摩洛哥海關要求，包括HS編碼歸類、適用進口關稅，以及工業部或相關部長令要求的合格文件。公共項目、IFC或世界銀行資助項目及私人購電方的採購規則可能要求或期望提供IMANOR合格標誌或CE標誌（作為替代參照指標）。

standards_or_laws: Loi 13-09 relative aux énergies renouvelables (as amended)
Décret de loi 47-09 relative à l'efficacité énergétique
Moroccan Customs Tariff and import regulations
MASEN project procurement specifications for utility-scale solar

summary.en: China PV inverters exported to Morocco are classified under HS 8504.40 (static converters) for customs purposes. Chinese export documentation (CCC exemption letter, GB/T 37408 test report, factory inspection certificate) is not a substitute for Moroccan IMANOR conformity, MASEN procurement requirements, or customs conformity attestations. Exporters should confirm whether a Moroccan ATA carnet or temporary import route applies for demonstration units.
summary.zh: 出口摩洛哥的中国光伏逆变器海关归类通常适用HS 8504.40（静止变换器）。中国出口文件（CCC豁免证明、GB/T 37408测试报告、工厂检验证书）不能替代摩洛哥IMANOR合格证明、MASEN采购要求或海关合格证明。出口商应确认样机是否适用摩洛哥ATA单证册或临时进口路径。
summary.zht: 出口摩洛哥的中國光伏逆變器海關歸類通常適用HS 8504.40（靜止變換器）。中國出口文件（CCC豁免證明、GB/T 37408測試報告、工廠檢驗證書）不能替代摩洛哥IMANOR合格證明、MASEN採購要求或海關合格證明。出口商應確認樣機是否適用摩洛哥ATA單證冊或臨時進口路徑。

gap.en: Confirm HS code classification with a Moroccan customs broker. Establish whether IMANOR conformity mark or a recognised third-party test certificate is required for customs clearance or the relevant public-procurement or project-finance requirement. Engage MASEN or AMEE early if the project falls under national renewable or efficiency programmes.
gap.zh: 应与摩洛哥报关行确认HS编码归类。确认海关清关或相关公共采购/项目融资要求是否需要IMANOR合格标志或认可第三方测试证书。如项目属于国家可再生能源或节能计划，应尽早与MASEN或AMEE沟通。
gap.zht: 應與摩洛哥報關行確認HS編碼歸類。確認海關清關或相關公共採購／項目融資要求是否需要IMANOR合格標誌或認可第三方測試證書。如項目屬於國家再生能源或節能計畫，應儘早與MASEN或AMEE溝通。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory customs compliance (HS classification, duties, conformity attestation as required); MASEN / public procurement requirements are project-specific and may mandate IEC or IMANOR evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese export requires standard customs export documentation; GB/T 37408 is mandatory for Chinese market but not for export documentation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco is a significant and growing solar market. Chinese exporters should engage a local agent or customs broker to confirm current import conformity requirements, customs duties, and MASEN or AMEE procurement standards before the first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥是重要且持续增长的太阳能市场。中国出口商在首次出货前应委托当地代理或报关行确认现行进口合规要求、关税及MASEN或AMEE采购标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥是重要且持續增長的太陽能市場。中國出口商在首次出貨前應委託當地代理或報關行確認現行進口合規要求、關稅及MASEN或AMEE採購標準。

requirement_topic.en: CN-MA Free Trade and Preferential Tariff Context for Solar Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 中摩自由贸易与光伏逆变器优惠关税背景
requirement_topic.zht: 中摩自由貿易與光伏逆變器優惠關稅背景

summary.en: Morocco has a free-trade agreement with the EU (Association Agreement) and bilateral FTAs with the USA, Egypt, Jordan, Tunisia, and others. Morocco does not have an FTA with China as of 2026. Standard import duties for HS 8504.40 static converters apply for Chinese-origin goods entering Morocco under the Most Favoured Nation (MFN) rate. Moroccan import duties on solar PV inverters can vary and may be affected by domestic industrialisation policy. Importers should confirm the current MFN rate, value-added tax, and any parafiscal levies with the Moroccan customs authority (ADII — Administration des Douanes et Impôts Indirects).
summary.zh: 摩洛哥与欧盟（联系协定）、美国、埃及、约旦、突尼斯等签有自由贸易协定。截至2026年，摩洛哥与中国尚无自由贸易协定。中国原产光伏逆变器进入摩洛哥适用最惠国（MFN）税率进口关税（HS 8504.40）。摩洛哥对光伏逆变器的进口关税可能因国内工业化政策而有所变化。进口商应与摩洛哥海关（ADII——海关和间接税管理局）确认现行最惠国税率、增值税及任何准财政税费。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥與歐盟（聯繫協定）、美國、埃及、約旦、突尼斯等簽有自由貿易協定。截至2026年，摩洛哥與中國尚無自由貿易協定。中國原產光伏逆變器進入摩洛哥適用最惠國（MFN）稅率進口關稅（HS 8504.40）。摩洛哥對光伏逆變器的進口關稅可能因國內工業化政策而有所變化。進口商應與摩洛哥海關（ADII——海關和間接稅管理局）確認現行最惠國稅率、增值稅及任何準財政稅費。

standards_or_laws: Loi de finances (annual finance law — may adjust duty rates)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter exports to Morocco use standard export customs procedures under MOFCOM / GACC rules. China certificate of origin (Form A or self-certification) does not confer preferential tariff treatment in Morocco as no GSP or FTA rate applies for Chinese-origin goods under the Moroccan tariff schedule as of 2026.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口摩洛哥采用商务部/海关总署标准出口海关程序。由于截至2026年摩洛哥关税表中中国原产商品不适用普惠制或自贸协定税率，中国产地证（Form A或自我声明）不能在摩洛哥享受优惠关税待遇。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口摩洛哥採用商務部/海關總署標準出口海關程序。由於截至2026年摩洛哥關稅表中中國原產商品不適用普惠制或自貿協定稅率，中國產地證（Form A或自我聲明）不能在摩洛哥享受優惠關稅待遇。

standards_or_laws: China MOFCOM / GACC export customs rules

gap.en: No FTA rate is available for Chinese-origin solar inverters entering Morocco. Confirm the current MFN import duty rate for HS 8504.40 with ADII or a licensed Moroccan customs broker. Include Morocco import duty and VAT in the landed-cost model. Verify whether Moroccan government programmes offer duty exemptions for renewable-energy equipment on a project basis.
gap.zh: 中国原产光伏逆变器进入摩洛哥无自贸协定税率可用。应通过ADII或持牌摩洛哥报关行确认HS 8504.40现行最惠国进口关税税率，并将进口关税和增值税纳入到岸成本模型。核实摩洛哥政府是否就可再生能源设备提供基于项目的关税豁免。
gap.zht: 中國原產光伏逆變器進入摩洛哥無自貿協定稅率可用。應通過ADII或持牌摩洛哥報關行確認HS 8504.40現行最惠國進口關稅稅率，並將進口關稅和增值稅納入到岸成本模型。核實摩洛哥政府是否就再生能源設備提供基於項目的關稅豁免。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory to comply with Moroccan customs import duty and VAT obligations; duty exemptions are project-specific and must be confirmed with ADII
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese export customs compliance is mandatory; no FTA preference applies for Morocco

source.publisher: Administration des Douanes et Impôts Indirects (ADII), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No China–Morocco FTA applies as of 2026. Confirm current MFN import duty for HS 8504.40 and any project-level duty exemptions with ADII or a licensed customs broker before pricing the export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年，中摩之间无自贸协定。在报价出口前，应通过ADII或持牌报关行确认HS 8504.40现行最惠国进口关税及任何项目级关税豁免。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年，中摩之間無自貿協定。在報價出口前，應通過ADII或持牌報關行確認HS 8504.40現行最惠國進口關稅及任何項目級關稅豁免。
